tools.name: slack_scan_digest
tools.description: Scan multiple Slack channels and return a digest of recent activity including top threads, participants, and privacy status.

channel_ids.description: Specific channel IDs to scan. If omitted, scans preferred or top active channels.

hours_back.description: How many hours of history to scan (default 24)

include_threads.description: Whether to fetch thread replies for top threads (default true)

max_channels.description: Maximum number of channels to scan (default 20)

format.description: Output format: 'text' returns JSON (default), 'blocks' returns Slack Block Kit structured output

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_channel_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a single Slack channel including name, topic, purpose, privacy status, and member count.

channel_id.description: The Slack channel ID to get details for

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_configure_channels
tools.description: Manage preferred Slack channels for scanning. List, add, remove, or set the preferred channel list.

action.description: Action to perform on the preferred channels list

channel_ids.description: Channel IDs to add, remove, or set (not needed for 'list')

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_delete_message
tools.description: Delete a Slack message posted by the bot. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_edit_message
tools.description: Edit a Slack message previously posted by the bot. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_leave_channel
tools.description: Leave a Slack channel. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: slack_channel_permissions
tools.description: Manage per-channel permission profiles for Slack channels. Configure which tools are available, set trust levels, and manage permission overrides on a per-channel basis.

action.description: Action to perform: list all profiles, get a specific channel's profile, set a channel's profile, remove a channel's profile, or clear all profiles

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (required for get, set, remove)

label.description: Human-readable label for this channel's permission set (for 'set' action)

allowed_tool_categories.description: Tool categories allowed in this channel. When set, only tools in these categories can be invoked (for 'set' action)

blocked_tools.description: Specific tool names blocked in this channel (for 'set' action)

trust_level.description: Trust level override: 'restricted' limits tool access, 'standard' uses defaults (for 'set' action)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
